title: Property Consultant - RMZ Corp - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - RMZ Corp - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
RMZ Corp has an exciting opening for a Property Consultant at our Navi Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About RMZ Corp:
RMZ Corp is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RMZ Corp!
